comment: PDHD run28368 v1 per-channel single-p.e. response templates (ADC, 16 ns ticks) and the offline-OpChannel -> template map, for Flash::OpDecon. The production set of protodunehd_template_list_v1 (duneopdet v10_20_09d00); files from the DUNE StashCache ProtoDUNE/HD/opdetresponse/v1/. Unmapped channels (dead 86,87,97,107,116,117, noisy 3, full-stream 120-159) are skipped, as in LArSoft IgnoreChannels.
